name: Kent Adrian Sato
title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
description: I'm a developer with a passion for building beautiful and functional web applications. I combine clean design with efficient code to deliver exceptional user experiences.

about.journey: With years of experience in web development, I specialize in modern technologies and best practices. I believe in continuous learning and staying updated with the latest industry trends.
whatIDo: Build responsive and accessible web applications

experience.description: Architected a highly scalable migration from legacy systems to a modern AWS Lambda and Node.js containerized environment serving over 1,000 users with zero downtime. I led a team of three developers, establishing development best practices and technical documentation that cut new-hire onboarding time by 60%. To maximize efficiency, I leveraged AI-assisted development tools and LLMs to optimize complex processes and boost sprint velocity. Operating in a global, cross-functional environment, I collaborated closely with international engineering teams and leadership to deliver robust products within 2-week Agile cycles.

experience.company: Above Digital (prev. Our Global Team, Inc.)
experience.description: Fstered a culture of continuous improvement by leading and mentoring a team of six developers through structured code reviews. My technical leadership extended to system architecture, where I successfully automated manual business processes by 75% and built a scalable platform supporting 100+ concurrent users with 99.9% uptime. I owned the full Agile SDLC, seamlessly bridging the gap between initial system design and final product deployment. Through this hands-on governance, I consistently ensured stable, high-performing software releases.

Engineered the core architectural foundation for a massive end-to-end ERP solution, building out critical finance, inventory, and customer management modules from the ground up. My role quickly expanded as I took full ownership of the system codebase and consistently delivered high-complexity enterprise features. This strong technical performance and proactive attitude allowed me to rapidly scale my responsibilities within the team. Consequently, I demonstrated senior-level impact ahead of my peers, earning an accelerated promotion to Senior Developer.

Managed end-to-end business operations for multiple clients, handling everything from initial project scoping and timeline estimation to final invoicing. On the technical side, I built custom WordPress websites for local small businesses and entrepreneurs, developing bespoke themes and integrating complex third-party plugins. Beyond web development, I provided versatile digital support by optimizing administrative workflows and designing marketing assets using Adobe Creative Suite. This comprehensive, client-first approach allowed me to maintain a 95% client satisfaction rate across all projects.
